directive: Review our recent metrics and identify the single highest-leverage change to improve free-to-Pro conversion. Use DB data to find churn-risk users and new signups. Ship one small targeted change.
ab_plan: - **Hypothesis:** Targeted email campaigns and in-app notifications to users who have shown high engagement (streaks of 7+ days) but have not converted to Pro will increase the free-to-Pro conversion rate by at least 15% within 7 days. - **Rationale:** Users with high engagement are likely to see value in the product and might need a nudge to convert, especially if they are close to exhausting their free credits or have not fully utilized the free features.
